accepted_variants: Parasite, Bong Joon Ho, and Leonardo da Vinci
Bong Joon Ho directed Parasite; Leonardo da Vinci painted the Mona Lisa
expected_answer: Parasite won 2020 Best Picture and was directed by Bong Joon Ho; the Mona Lisa was painted by Leonardo da Vinci.
notes: No single cited page answers all parts: the Oscar page supports Parasite/Bong Joon Ho, while the art page supports Leonardo da Vinci.
query: Which film won the 2020 Academy Award for Best Picture, who directed it, and who painted the Mona Lisa on the distractor page?
